response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and cloud platforms, but lacks direct experience in some key technologies like vector databases and RAG architectures.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong background in full-stack development with TypeScript and Node.js
Proven ability to lead technical projects and contribute to developer tooling
concerns: Limited direct experience with vector databases and RAG architectures
No explicit mention of experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
No clear indication of knowledge about LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience with key technologies
